title: nepeta nawarica
intro: Nepeta nawarica, also known as Indian catmint or Nepeta faassenii, is a perennial herb native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nepeta nawarica include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
